cashCard.multiCurrencyNote: Total is approximate — converted at today's rates

holdings.noStocksBody: Start by browsing the market and making your first trade.

col.unrealizedPlTooltip: This is how much you'd gain or lose if you sold now. It's 'unrealized' because you haven't sold yet.

tradeHistory.tradeTooltipExplanation: A trade is when you buy or sell shares of a stock.

review.title: Review Trade
review.tooltipExplanation: Always review your trades before confirming. In real investing, you can't undo a trade!

reflection.title: Selling at a loss
reflection.heading: You'd be selling at a loss. What's your reason?

story.label: The company's story has changed
story.response: A real reason to rethink — stories matter more than prices.

cash.label: I need the cash for something else
cash.response: Fair — needing money is a real reason.

fear.label: The price is falling and it scares me
fear.response: That's the one to watch: falling prices alone are often the worst reason to sell. Markets wobble; selling locks in the loss.

market.heading: Browse Stocks
market.searchPlaceholder: Search any stock or company (e.g. Apple, Toyota, Samsung)…
market.searchTypeMore: Type one more character to search…
market.featuredSummary: {{count}} featured stocks — search to find any stock worldwide
market.noResultsSearch: No stocks found for "{{query}}". Try a different name or ticker.

marketNews.aiReading: AI is reading the news for you…

stockDetail.notAvailable: This stock isn't available in practice mode.
stockDetail.priceTooltipExplanation: This is the current price for one share. In practice mode, prices stay the same so you can learn without surprises.

stockChart.noData: No price data available for this period

chartGuide.heading: Learn to Read Charts
chartGuide.aiAnalysing: AI is analysing this chart for you…
chartGuide.askPenny: Ask Coach Penny about this chart

trend.title: Reading the trend
trend.tip: If the line goes up from left to right, the price has been rising. If it goes down, the price has been falling. The steeper the line, the faster the change.

colour.title: Green vs Red
colour.tip: A green chart means the price is higher now than at the start of the period — the stock gained value. Red means it lost value. Neither is permanently good or bad!

timePeriods.title: Time periods matter
timePeriods.tip: A stock might look bad on a 1-day chart but great on a 1-year chart. Always check multiple time periods before forming an opinion.

shadedArea.title: The shaded area
shadedArea.tip: The coloured area under the line helps you see the overall trend at a glance. A large shaded area that grows means steady gains over time.

chartCoach.name: Coach Penny
chartCoach.emptyPrompt: Ask me anything about this {{ticker}} chart! 📊
chartCoach.error: Something went wrong. Try sending your message again.

diversification.label: Diversification
diversification.body: Spreading across more companies lowers the damage any one can do

growthProjection.heading: If your portfolio kept growing ~7% a year…
growthProjection.disclaimer: An illustration of compounding — not a prediction or a promise.
